content:
# Strategy

## Goal
Formalize Nitsure's "Construction of Hilbert and Quot Schemes" (MR2223407,
arXiv:math/0504590): the representability of the projective Quot functor
Quot_{E/X/S}^{Phi,L} by a projective S-scheme (Grothendieck; Altman-Kleiman
form, `thm:altman-kleiman-quot`), together with its corollaries — the Hilbert
scheme, the scheme of morphisms, and quotients by flat projective equivalence
relations.

## Phases & estimations

This is a research-scale target: most of the foundational layer (coherent-sheaf
cohomology of projective morphisms, Serre vanishing, cohomology-and-base-change
EGA III §7, Proj of a graded sheaf, flattening) is at or beyond the current
Mathlib frontier. The plan takes a large foundational layer as cited/Mathlib
anchors (Chapter `Basic`) and builds the construction proper on top.

First milestone (axiom-independent): **Grassmannian scheme representability**
(the `Functors` Grassmannian half) — self-contained, does not depend on the
EGA III §7 / Serre-vanishing anchor layer, and half-supplied by Mathlib's
`Module.Grassmannian R M k` (points-functor value). Build it first while the
foundational-anchor decision (below) is settled in parallel.

Scaffold is COMPLETE (iter-004): all 7 chapters Lean-backed, goal stated
faithfully, 0 axiom. The remaining arc is the **prover stage**. Two bands of
work are reachable now without the EGA-III layer (small proofs + the
axiom-independent Grassmannian scheme construction); everything else is gated on
a large foundational BUILD.

| Phase | Status | Iters left | LOC | Key Mathlib needs | Risks |
|-------|--------|-----------|-----|-------------------|-------|
| Grassmannian properties & representability | ACTIVE | 3–6 | ~150–350 | glued-scheme separatedness criterion (ABSENT: no `GlueData→IsSeparated`); `valuativeCriterion_proper` (QC/QS/finite-type instances + DVR criterion); R-points of a glued scheme ↔ `Module.Grassmannian` | scheme `:= D.glued` CLOSED iter-010. Reachable now: `grassmannian_separated` (build the affine-glued separatedness criterion), then `grassmannian_proper` (Nitsure DVR valuation arg). Deep: `grassmannian_represents` (glued-scheme functor of points). GAP-BLOCKED: `grassmannianUniversalQuotient`/`grassmannian_very_ample` (need `IsLocallyFreeOfRank`/`det U`=⋀ᵈ stubs) |
| relativeProj BUILD (keystone foundational anchor) | ACTIVE | 3–6 | large | `Proj.toSpecZero`/`isSeparated`/`IsProper`/`Proj.map` PRESENT; `Proj.map`–`toSpecZero` naturality ABSENT (build); cross-$S$ glue over explicit cover + frame 1-cocycle | single-chart + frame-change + base-change transitions all DONE+functorial; step-5 structure-morphism compat dispatched iter-010; cross-$S$ glue mirrors Grassmannian GlueData (sequenced after lane-1 template); sole absent piece = `S.Modules`→(cover,frames) adapter (deferred) |
| EGA-III §7 cohomology BUILD/axiomatize (bottleneck) | BLOCKED | many | large | coherent cohomology `Rⁱπ_*`/`Hⁱ`, Serre vanishing/`O(r)`, cohomology-and-base-change, fppf descent | all absent from Mathlib; AXIOMATIZE→discharge per anchor table; gates almost every §4–§6 body |
| flat-locus openness (EGA IV 11.1.1) | BLOCKED | several | large | openness of stalk-map flat locus (smooth-locus + free-locus exist, neither suffices) | own sub-phase; gates `flatness_local_criterion` (2), `isomorphism_is_open` |
| Gap-blocked bodies (§5 Quot + §6 Variants) | BLOCKED on foundational BUILD | many | large | downstream of the EGA-III layer | statement-faithful scaffolds, not stalled proofs — do NOT dispatch until foundations land |

## Completed

| Phase | Iters (done@ · used) | LOC | Files | Key results | Reusable techniques | Pitfalls |
|-------|----------------------|-----|-------|-------------|---------------------|----------|
| Blueprint roadmap (dag) | 001 · 1 | 0 (tex only) | 7 chapters | Full informal cone rooted at `thm:altman-kleiman-quot`; 0 ∞/broken/isolated/unmatched | Section-per-chapter mirror of Nitsure; verbatim source quotes per block | `% archon:covers` lines forward-ref Lean files absent until scaffolded — transient doctor warnings, do NOT delete |
| Autoformalize scaffold | 004 · 3 | ~? (stubs) | 7 Lean files, 75 blocks | Every block Lean-backed; goal `thm:altman-kleiman-quot` stated faithfully & non-vacuously; 0 axiom | gap-object-as-abstract-input; universe-gap representability; valuative-criterion partial proof (`⟨valuativeCriterion_proper …, sorry⟩`) | two representability shadows diverged (`pointsFunctor` ≅-form vs `RepresentsFunctor` bijection) — unify later; `frontier`=0 until foundational layer lands |
| Reachable proofs (no EGA-III) | 005 · 1 | small | Functors, Variants | `grassmannian_cocycle`, `descent_of_subschemes` (both parts), `flatness_local_criterion` (1) closed axiom-clean | matrix-cocycle `convert … using 3`; ffqc→`EffectiveEpi`→cofork; quotient-map+saturation set-level descent; noetherian⇒finite-presentation⇒`UniversallyOpen.of_flat` | 2 of 5 tagged-reachable lanes were actually gap-blocked (relativeProj separatedness; flat-locus openness) — probe gap-status per statement, not per file |
| Grassmannian scheme construction (`:= D.glued`) | 010 · 6 (006–010) | ~110 net | Functors | `grassmannianScheme := (grassGlueData r d).glued` — genuine glued scheme, axiom-clean; full `Scheme.GlueData` (all data + `t_fac`/`cocycle` Prop fields); relativeProj single-chart+frame+base transitions+step-5 (Basic) | `Scheme.GlueData` per-field bottom-up; iso-conjugated `t'`⇒Prop-field collapses to a ring identity; `pullbackSpecIso_inv_fst`/`Spec.map_comp` combine need `erw` (Localization.Away Algebra-instance diamond); split `erw`/`rw` to stay under heartbeat | `lean_run_code` uses a DIFFERENT mathlib (v4.30) — verify API in-file; planner's "make helpers private" never executed by provers (29 stayed public, blueprinted iter-011) |

## Routes
Single route: follow Nitsure's exposition section-by-section. The construction is
linear — regularity ⇒ semicontinuity/base-change ⇒ flattening ⇒ embed Quot into
a Grassmannian as a flattening stratum ⇒ properness ⇒ variants. The Grassmannian
scheme (axiom-independent) is the first concrete milestone and can advance ahead
of the cohomology layer. `Regularity` ∥ `Semicontinuity` are largely independent;
the three `Variants` corollaries are independent terminal theorems.

## Foundational anchors (build vs. axiomatize)
The construction rests on a foundational layer confirmed absent from Mathlib. Each
anchor (Chapter `Basic`) gets an explicit decision. Axiom-soundness discipline:
every axiomatized anchor must be (a) a single named standard theorem with a
literature citation, (b) individually true, and (c) collectively too weak to
trivialize Quot representability (the conclusion is never smuggled into an axiom).
Each is tracked for later discharge.

| Anchor | In Mathlib? | Decision |
|--------|-------------|----------|
| Valuative criterion of properness | YES (`IsProper.of_valuativeCriterion`) | use Mathlib (\mathlibok) |
| `Module.Grassmannian R M k` (points functor) | YES (`RingTheory.Grassmannian`) | use Mathlib for the moduli set |
| Proj of a graded ring | YES (`AlgebraicGeometry.Proj`) | use Mathlib |
| Relative Proj of a graded sheaf | NO | BUILD (needed for projective S-schemes) |
| Coherent cohomology + Serre vanishing (proj. morphisms) | NO | AXIOMATIZE → discharge (cite EGA III 2.2, Serre FAC) |
| Cohomology-and-base-change / Grothendieck complex (EGA III §7) | NO | AXIOMATIZE → discharge (cite EGA III 7.7) |
| fppf descent for quasi-coherent sheaves | partial | use Mathlib where possible, else AXIOMATIZE |

## Open strategic questions
- Sequencing of the AXIOMATIZE anchors' discharge: after the main theorem is
  conditionally complete, or interleaved? (Current lean: conditional-first.)
- RESOLVED (iter-007): relativeProj rides on Mathlib's `Proj.toSpecZero` per chart
  (separatedness + properness FREE), glued across an affine cover of $S$; built for
  locally-free/coherent `_V` (option a), so local `Sym` is just the polynomial ring
  on a frame (no full sheaf-`Sym`).
- Hilbert-polynomial / Euler-characteristic machinery (Snapper's lemma): assume
  from Mathlib's Euler-characteristic API or develop?
- Representability: unify the two shadows (`pointsFunctor` ≅-form in §5 vs
  `RepresentsFunctor` bijection in §6) into one shared predicate (likely in
  `Functors`/`Basic`)? Cross-file refactor; deferred — both honest, goal faithful
  either way.

## Mathlib gaps & new material
Gaps to fill: `Sym` of a (locally free) sheaf + relative `Proj` of a sheaf
(BOTH verified absent iter-006 — only graded-RING `AlgebraicGeometry.Proj`
exists); flat-locus openness EGA IV 11.1.1 (smooth-locus + module-free-locus
exist, neither covers stalk-map flat locus); coherent cohomology + Serre
vanishing; cohomology-and-base-change Grothendieck complex (EGA III §7);
m-regularity; flattening stratification; Quot/Hilbert representability.
New project material: Hilb/Quot functors and their Hilbert-polynomial
decomposition; Grassmannian scheme + tautological quotient; m-regular sheaves;
flattening-stratification subschemes; the Quot scheme + universal quotient.
